lines.text: Initializing... Connection established. Welcome, Traveler. Your journey begins now.

To the seeker who arrives:
Three islands await your presence.

Three trials will test your spirit.
Three stars will light your path.
Seek understanding in sight, action, and language.
To the right, the island of sight. To the left, the island of action. down south, the island of language.

When all three shine bright, the storm will part.
The path to the core will be open.
